name: Finance — Dispute Triage

nodes.name: Dispute Webhook
nodes._comment: Register this URL in: PayPal → Webhooks, Stripe → Webhooks, Klarna → Notifications. Event: CUSTOMER.DISPUTE.CREATED

body.subject: =🔴 New Dispute: {{ $('Normalize Dispute').first().json.source.toUpperCase() }} {{ $('Normalize Dispute').first().json.amount }}{{ $('Normalize Dispute').first().json.currency }}
body.html:
=

🔴 New Payment Dispute

Platform{{ $('Normalize Dispute').first().json.source.toUpperCase() }}
Amount{{ $('Normalize Dispute').first().json.amount }} {{ $('Normalize Dispute').first().json.currency }}
Reason{{ $('Normalize Dispute').first().json.reason }}
Order ID{{ $('Normalize Dispute').first().json.order_id || '—' }}
Deadline{{ $('Normalize Dispute').first().json.deadline || 'Check platform' }}

Action required: Open Business OS → Finance → Disputes to triage.

Rule: Escalate to Luis if amount >150€ or customer claims fraud.

_comment: SETUP: (1) Deploy, copy webhook URL. (2) Register URL in PayPal + Stripe + Klarna webhook settings. Event: dispute/chargeback created. (3) Set env vars: SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, RESEND_API_KEY. (4) Update Vanessa's email address if different.
